nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 內華達山脈 (美國)
nodes.summary: 內華達山脈 (美國)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括朱红蜂鸟、长耳鸮、西點林鴞等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 爱达荷州
nodes.summary: 爱达荷州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括朱红蜂鸟、Woodhouse's scrub jay、岩鹪鹩，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 路易斯安那州
nodes.summary: 路易斯安那州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Black francolin、美洲鶴、玫瑰琵鷺等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 溫哥華
nodes.summary: 溫哥華是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Cocos booby、朱红蜂鸟、白頭海鵰等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 朱红蜂鸟
nodes.summary: 朱红蜂鸟（Anna's hummingbird，学名 Calypte anna），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: However, birds have been spotted far outside their range in such places as southern Alaska, Idaho, Saskatchewan, New York, Florida, Louisiana, and Newfoundland

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: However, birds have been spotted far outside their range in such places as southern Alaska, Idaho, Saskatchewan, New York, Florida, Louisiana, and Newfoundland

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: See distribution map on bottom of page. In response to rising temperatures at low elevations during climate change in the 21st century, Anna's hummingbirds have expanded their range into the cooler summer environments of higher-altitude (up to ) mountainous terrains of California, such as the Sierra Nevada.{{cite journal | last1=Spence | first1=Austin R

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | title=Winter range expansion of a hummingbird is associated with urbanization and supplementary feeding | journal= Proceedings of the Royal Society B: Biological Sciences| volume=284 | issue=1852 | date=5 April 2017 | issn=0962-8452 | pmid=28381617 | pmc=5394677 | doi=10.1098/rspb.2017.0256 | article-number=20170256}} Although quantitative data are absent, it is likely that a sizable percentage of Anna's hummingbirds in the Pacific Northwest still do migrate south for winter, as of 2017. thumb|Female in Nocturnality|nocturnal [[torpor during winter; , near Vancouver, British Columbia
